title: [Discontinued] YLC
description: A Vanilla++ experience with: Many decorational variety, lots of exploration (like new bosses through multiple mods) while having tweaked different aspects of minecraft for the better.
body:
When playing modded or v+, you mostly go for a bit of variety and a lot of building. At least that's the case for me.
Though a lot of mods that guarantee you variety can really just get you overpowered easily and you can cheese your way through. ✔️
 
Here, you get things like new bosses (Marium's Soulslike Weapons or Bosses of Mass Destruction), a hell lot of tweaks (like a delete slot) and enough decorational blocks to warm your heart while still having a sort of linear balancing. ✔️

And: Everyone has their own loot (Lootr). So this modpack was built with a multiplayer aspect in mind ✔️

 

✔️Included in this modpack

https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-roofs

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-paths-and-pavings

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-enchantments

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/continents

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-paintings

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers-fabric
